name: Wil Anderson
blurb: He hosted the youth-radio breakfast show on Triple J and created and hosted the ABC advertising panel show The Gruen Transfer.
bio: Wil Anderson is an Australian comedian, writer, presenter and podcaster who moved from newspaper journalism into stand-up and broadcasting. He hosted the youth-radio breakfast show on Triple J and created and hosted the ABC advertising panel show The Gruen Transfer. He holds the record for the most Melbourne International Comedy Festival People's Choice Awards.

timeline.ev: Graduates top of his journalism class
Hosts the Triple J breakfast show
Creates and hosts ABC's The Gruen Transfer
Tours the solo show The Big Three-Oh!
Continues hosting the Gruen franchise on ABC

accolades: Record six Melbourne Comedy Festival People's Choice Awards
Creator and host of The Gruen Transfer
